title: Core Python Workspace Compatibility Contract
subject: core.python.workspace

compatibility.notes: The governed Python workspace is pinned through .python-version and local tooling expectations.
Workspace bootstrap, schema validation, and command docs assume the current local toolchain contract.
Operator-facing command behavior is documented under docs/commands/core_python/ and should stay backward-stable within the current workspace slice.

notes: This first compatibility contract covers the governed local Python workspace only.
